
<!-- Reference links -->

<!-- CARDAT -->
[cardat-home]: http://cardat.github.io/
[cardat-mail]: mailto:car.data@curtin.edu.au
[cardat-gh]: https://github.com/cardat/
[cardat-data-repo]: https://cloud.car-dat.org/

<!-- CARDAT repos -->
[gh-napmdtools]: https://github.com/cardat/napmdtools
[gh-cardatdbtools]: https://github.com/cardat/cardatdbtools
[gh-bushfire_pm25_v1_3_tools]: https://github.com/cardat/bushfire_pm25_v1_3_tools

<!-- Key orgs -->
[whocc-home]: https://research.curtin.edu.au/whocc-cchia/
[csa-home]: https://safeair.org.au/
[heal-home]: https://healnetwork.org.au/
[ardc-home]: https://ardc.edu.au/
[tern-home]: https://www.tern.org.au/
